entities.name: DINANATH GRASS
entities.description: A forage grass (Pennisetum pedicellatum Trin.) known for its significant drought resilience.

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand and adapt to water-deficient conditions.

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Water deficient conditions, specifically analyzed at 48-hour and 96-hour intensities.

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOMIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: The study of the complete set of RNA transcripts produced by the genome under specific conditions.

entities.name: METABOLOMIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: The study of small molecule metabolites within a biological sample.

entities.name: PHENOLICS
entities.description: Secondary metabolites that accumulate in response to 48-hour drought stress.

entities.name: FLAVONOIDS
entities.description: Secondary metabolites that accumulate in response to 48-hour drought stress.

entities.name: LIPID METABOLISM
entities.description: Metabolic pathways predominantly involved in the response to 96-hour drought conditions.

entities.name: STEROL LIPIDS
entities.description: Specific lipids that accumulate under 96-hour drought conditions.

entities.name: PHENYLPROPANOID PATHWAY
entities.description: A metabolic pathway playing a crucial role in the drought response to 48-hour water deficit.

entities.name: BRASSINOSTEROID SIGNALING
entities.description: A signaling pathway playing a crucial role in the drought response to 96-hour water deficit.

entities.name: PHENYLALANINE AMMONIA-LYASE
entities.description: A gene positively regulated with drought tolerance.

entities.name: PUTRESCINE HYDROXYCINNAMOYL TRANSFERASE
entities.description: A gene positively regulated with drought tolerance.

entities.name: ABSCISIC ACID 8’-HYDROXYLASE 2
entities.description: A gene positively regulated with drought tolerance.

entities.name: SYNTAXIN-61
entities.description: A gene positively regulated with drought tolerance.

entities.name: LIPOXYGENASE 5
entities.description: A gene positively regulated with drought tolerance.

entities.name: CALCIUM-DEPENDENT PROTEIN KINASE
entities.description: A gene positively regulated with drought tolerance.

entities.name: PHOSPHOLIPASE D ALPHA ONE
entities.description: A gene positively regulated with drought tolerance.

entities.name: SECONDARY CELL WALL THICKENING
entities.description: A regulatory pathway involved in imparting drought tolerance to leaves.

entities.name: LIGNIN BIOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: A regulatory pathway involved in imparting drought tolerance to leaves.

entities.name: TRANSGENIC APPROACH
entities.description: A method for developing abiotic stress-tolerant grasses and crop varieties.

entities.name: GENOME EDITING
entities.description: A method for developing abiotic stress-tolerant grasses and crop varieties.
